stemHtml: A pilot is taxiing when someone tries to enter the cockpit. What shall the pilot do?

options.a: He/she must take-off and fly towards an isolated airfield.
options.b: He/she must always immediately initiate an emergency evacuation.
options.c: He/she must remain as far away from other aircraft as possible and taxi to a designated or isolated parking area in accordance with local instructions.
options.d: He/she must taxi towards the terminal areas so that help can be obtained as soon as possible.
